array.string: Play Pink Floyd in Music Assistant
Play Dark Side of the Moon in Music Assistant
Play my favorites in Music Assistant
In Music Assistant, play Alela Diane
In Music Assistant, play my workout playlist
I love this song in Music Assistant
I like this song in Music Assistant
I dislike this song in Music Assistant
Add this to my favorites in Music Assistant
In Music Assistant, I love this song
Search for jazz in Music Assistant
Find Pink Floyd in Music Assistant
Look up Beyoncé in Music Assistant
Search for Dark Side of the Moon in Music Assistant
In Music Assistant, search for podcasts about coffee
